name: The House of Wisdom
description: Alchemist-heavy with custom Takwin creations and cross-faction armoury access.
add_rules: Alchemists: Must include 1-2 Jabirean Alchemists. Alchemist Armour Limit: 2.
Kavasses: Azebs become 'Kavasses' — cannot buy SKIRMISHER but can gain +1 DICE Melee for +5d.
Noble Guardians: Can include 0-2 Fāris (Janissary profile with ELITE keyword).
Weapon Collections: Can purchase 1 item from New Antioch Armoury and 1 from Trench Pilgrims Armoury.

Takwin Homunculus: Can include 0-2 custom 40d units. Buy abilities: Hypnotic Eyes (15d), Inhuman Strength (15d, +STRONG), Massive Size (30d, 50mm base, FEAR), Regenerative Tissue (25d, REGENERATE 1), Seal of Solomon (10d, +intelligence), Startling Speed (10d, +1 DICE Dash), Terrifying Appearance (10d, FEAR or +1 DICE), Two Heads (5d), Wings (30d, FLYING).

abilities: Noble Guardian: Uses Janissary profile with ELITE keyword.
Custom creation. Purchase formula abilities at recruitment.
